title: ATMA Consultancy Services | AI & IT Consultancy — Abhishek Singh, Avadhesh Kumar, Chirag Beniwal | New Delhi
description: ATMA Consultancy Services is an elite AI and IT consultancy founded by Abhishek Singh (MTech, JNU), Avadhesh Kumar (MTech, IIT Delhi), and Chirag Beniwal (MTech, JNU). We deliver custom LLM deployment, enterprise architecture, edge AI research, neuro-symbolic robotics, e-commerce solutions, and full-stack web development from New Delhi, India.
text_content: ATMA Consultancy Services | AI & IT Consultancy — Abhishek Singh, Avadhesh Kumar, Chirag Beniwal | New Delhi Premium AI & Engineering Architecting the Future of Enterprise AI Elite consultancy delivering neuro-symbolic algorithms, enterprise architecture, and robust digital platforms from New Delhi. Explore Our Work Read Our Research 0 + Projects Delivered 0.0 % Uptime SLA 0 IIT/JNU Founders atma_deploy.ts const solution = await ATMA . deploy ({ model : "enterprise_llm" , scale : "auto" , security : "zero_trust" , infrastructure : "cloud_native" }); // Output ✓ Neural pipeline initialized ✓ Cloud topology optimized ✓ System live — 99.99% uptime Lightning Fast Sub-100ms Response Zero Trust Enterprise Security What We Do Solutions Built for Scale From AI research to production deployment — our services cover the full spectrum of enterprise technology. AI & GenAI Solutions Custom LLM deployment, RAG pipelines, and autonomous agents built for your enterprise data. Data Science & Analytics Transform raw data into strategic foresight with predictive models and real-time dashboards. Enterprise Architecture High-performance, scalable systems designed for millions of users and zero downtime. Cloud Infrastructure Cloud-native migrations and DevOps pipelines that cut costs and accelerate deployment. Full-Stack Development End-to-end web and mobile applications using modern frameworks like Next.js, React, and Node. Cybersecurity Consulting Zero-trust architecture, penetration testing, and compliance-first security implementations. Leadership Built by India's Best Minds Our founding team brings elite academic training from IIT and JNU, combined with deep industry experience. Abhishek Singh Co-Founder & CEO MTech, JNU Full-Stack Architecture & AI Systems Avadhesh Kumar Co-Founder & Lead Engineer MTech, IIT Delhi Machine Learning & Cloud Infrastructure Chirag Beniwal Co-Founder & Tech Lead MTech, JNU Enterprise Systems & Data Engineering Kumar Pratyay Co-Founder & Full-Stack Developer BTech & MBA, JNU Full-Stack Development Portfolio Proven Track Record Enterprise sites, e-commerce platforms, institutional networks, and open-source civic tech.
